node: The wick method of agricultural farming in space
historical_parallel: The Hanging Gardens of Babylon (600 BC)
era_resolution: Utilization of advanced irrigation systems and manual labor to maintain the gardens
modern_resolution: Implementation of hydroponics, aeroponics, and precision agriculture technologies to enhance crop yields and reduce water consumption in space-based farming

biblical_tie.context: The Lord will guide you always; he will satisfy your needs in a sun-scorched land and will strengthen your frame. You will be like a well-watered garden, like a spring whose waters never fail.

protocol: UESP recommends integrating cutting-edge hydroponic and aeroponic systems to optimize resource utilization and crop growth in space-based agriculture, while ensuring adherence to sustainable and eco-friendly practices.
